default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and technical improvements for Dimmo's website.](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exceptional indexing rate: 30/31 new articles indexed within first week, ranking on 2nd-4th page](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Impressions skyrocketed (15,000+), but clicks remain low due to current rankings](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Several technical SEO improvements identified, including optimizing event pages, fixing duplicate titles, and addressing Noble-related issues](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Content strategy focusing on tool features, with 30 topics planned for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [31 articles published, 30 indexed within first week (99.9% indexing rate)](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [15,000+ impressions in first week, but low click-through rate](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Most new pages ranking on 2nd to 4th page of Google SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Average position dropped due to new content, expected to improve over time](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Best performance seen for keywords like "best call tracking software", "CPQ software", "best content marketing software"](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

### Technical SEO Audit Findings

  - [Overall health score of 80% (177 errors, 2.5k warnings)](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Homepage has 3 H1 tags instead of recommended single H1](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Duplicate title tags found on some blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [Some category pages (e.g., application security) creating crawl budget issues](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [24 HTTP links on HTTPS pages need updating](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [External links to hyperbound.ai and G2.com need fixing (404 errors)](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Noble JavaScript causing Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) issues](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

### Content Strategy and Improvements

  - [Focusing on tool features (e.g., "top outreach features", "top sugar CRM features")](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Planning 30 topics around features for weeks 3 and 4](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Will monitor performance to determine future content direction](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Discussed optimizing event pages with recordings, AI summaries, and relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Need to create author profiles for Troy, Lucas, and Sarah](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

### Action Items

  - [Troy: Upload event recordings to shared drive](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Lucas: Address duplicate title tags, work on Noble-related issues](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Team: Create author profiles, update external links, add upload dates to product page schema](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [GrowthX: Continue publishing planned articles, monitor performance, assist with technical improvements](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Publish 15 articles from the previous week](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Create and implement author profiles](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Address technical SEO issues identified in the audit](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Optimize event pages with recordings and relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Monitor performance of newly published articles](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Continue with planned content strategy, focusing on tool features](https://fathom.video/share/z3caGozWmFXVWKf6myZAJRWbor7UsZNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

action_items.description: Create author profiles for Troy, Lucas, Sabrager in CMS
Gather all available past event recordings, upload to drive, send to Prateek
Fix duplicate title tags on blog posts (e.g. hyperbound review on cold calling strategies)
Update external links - fix hyperbound.ai links (from .com to .ai), update broken G2.com links
Address Noble-related issues - CLS, page push-down, JS/CSS unification. Discuss with Noble or consider removal
Add upload date to product page video schema data
